JOIN THE CLUBGRASS VOLLEYBALL AT FSU

One signup gets you on a squad, into practices, and playing. Fill this out and we will see you on the sand.

01Your CourtSense account
This is your CourtSense login. It travels with you across the club, leagues, and pickup.
02About you
03Which squad fits you

Tell us where you would like to start. This is a request; the exec team sets your final squad after tryouts.

If you have a TruVolley number, add it and we will use it as your starting point. Not sure of yours? Look it up at truvolley.com/ratings, or leave it blank and we will sort it out at tryouts.
